specific_question: Did the Elexion Automotive cybersecurity team analyze any external market data during Q4 2024?
answer: Yes, the Elexion Automotive cybersecurity team did analyze external market data in Q4 2024. Specifically, the team reviewed the 2024 Global Automotive Cybersecurity report, which gave them insights for heading into the 2025 fiscal year.
dr_question: Referencing the information shared in the April 2025 article from Help Net Security, what external cybersecurity market data involving the automotive industry should Elexion Automotive analyze by the end of Q4 2025 to protect consumer data and safety?
